title: Odyssey, Book 19: The Scar
description: Book 19 of Homer's Odyssey: The Scar.
introduction: Book 19 of the Odyssey: The Scar. The Greek text follows the standard Homeric vulgate.

translation.original_text: Αὐτὰρ ὁ ἐν μεγάρῳ ὑπελείπετο δῖος Ὀδυσσεύς.
translation.text: Odysseus spoke with Penelope, still disguised. She told him of her weaving trick — weaving a shroud by day and unraveling it by night. The old nurse Eurycleia washed his feet and recognized the scar on his thigh from a boar hunt long ago. Odysseus seized her throat and swore her to silence.
